messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate an earthy PowerPoint presentation for farm cooperatives in the Agriculture industry reporting on this year's crop yield performance, containing exactly 8 slides with a natural theme using green, brown, and beige palettes. The output filename must be "Crop_Yield_Report.pptx". Write all presentation content in English and use 4:3 Standard orientation. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping; generate all data locally based on standard agricultural yield metrics. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# --- Constants ---
OUTPUT_FILE = "Crop_Yield_Report.pptx"
SLIDE_WIDTH_IN = 10.0
SLIDE_HEIGHT_IN = 7.5
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH_IN - MARGIN_LEFT.inches * 2

PALETTE = {
    "dark_green": "#2E5939",
    "medium_green": "#4A7C59",
    "light_green": "#8FBF8F",
    "brown": "#6B4226",
    "gold_brown": "#8B6914",
    "beige": "#D4C5A9",
    "cream": "#F5F0E8",
    "white": "#FFFFFF",
    "dark_text": "#333333",
}

FONT_HEADING = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color_hex=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color_hex:
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    else:
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["dark_text"])
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    if bg_color is None:
        bg_color = PALETTE["cream"]
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = title
    run.font.size = Pt(14)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["dark_green"])
    if body:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        run2 = p2.add_run()
        run2.text = body
        run2.font.size = Pt(11)
        run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["dark_text"])
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    label_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.35), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.4))
    label_shape.fill.solid()
    label_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["medium_green"])
    label_shape.line.fill.background()
    tf = label_shape.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(12)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["cream"])


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    footer_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.0), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.4))
    footer_bar.fill.solid()
    footer_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["dark_green"])
    footer_bar.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.15), Inches(7.08), Inches(3), Inches(0.25), "Farm Cooperative Alliance", font_size=9, color_hex=PALETTE["cream"])
    add_text_box(slide, slide.shapes[-1].left + Inches(6.5), Inches(7.08), Inches(3), Inches(0.25), f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT, color_hex=PALETTE["cream"])


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        ph = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        ph.fill.solid()
        ph.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["beige"])
        ph.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["brown"])
        ph.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.6), "Image Placeholder", font_size=11, color_hex=PALETTE["brown"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# --- Slide Builders ---

def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["dark_green"])
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.2), "Crop Yield Performance Report", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["cream"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.0), Inches(2.85), Inches(2.0), Inches(0.06))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["gold_brown"])
    line_shape.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(3.2), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.5), "Annual Agricultural Yield Analysis", font_size=20, color_hex=PALETTE["beige"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.5), "Farm Cooperative Alliance — 2024 Season", font_size=16, color_hex=PALETTE["light_green"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.5), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.4), "Prepared for Board of Directors & Cooperative Members", font_size=12, color_hex=PALETTE["beige"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def build_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), "Executive Summary", font_size=28, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["dark_green"])
    add_section_label(slide, "Key Performance Indicators")

    kpi_data = [
        ("Total Yield", "14.2M Tons", PALETTE["medium_green"]),
        ("Avg Yield/Acre", "3.8 Tons", PALETTE["gold_brown"]),
        ("Top Crop", "Corn — 5.1M Tons", PALETTE["dark_green"]),
        ("YoY Growth", "+7.4%", PALETTE["brown"]),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.0)
    card_height = Inches(1.6)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (CONTENT_WIDTH - 4 * card_width.inches - 3 * gap.inches) / 2
    y_pos = Inches(1.5)

    for i, (title, body, accent_color) in enumerate(kpi_data):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width.inches + gap.inches)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, title, body, PALETTE["white"], accent_color)
        # Add colored top bar
        bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y_pos, card_width, Inches(0.12))
        bar.fill.solid()
        bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
        bar.line.fill.background()


def build_crop_performance(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Crop Performance Overview"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), "Crop Performance Overview", font_size=28, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["dark_green"])
    add_section_label(slide, "Yield by Crop Type (Million Tons)")

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Wheat", "Corn", "Soybeans", "Rice", "Barley"]
    chart_data.add_series("2024 Yield", (3.8, 5.1, 2.6, 1.9, 0.8))

    left = Inches(1.5)
    top = Inches(1.7)
    width = Inches(7.0)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["medium_green"])

    value_labels = series.data_labels
    value_labels.number_format = "#,##0.0"
    value_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    value_labels.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["dark_text"])


def build_regional_breakdown(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Regional Yield Breakdown"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), "Regional Yield Breakdown", font_size=28, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["dark_green"])
    add_section_label(slide, "Yield by Region (Tons per Acre)")

    regions = [
        ("North Plains", "4.2 T/A", PALETTE["medium_green"]),
        ("Central Valley", "3.9 T/A", PALETTE["gold_brown"]),
        ("Southern Fields", "3.5 T/A", PALETTE["brown"]),
        ("Eastern Highlands", "4.0 T/A", PALETTE["dark_green"]),
        ("Western Delta", "3.7 T/A", PALETTE["medium_green"]),
        ("Northern Ridge", "3.3 T/A", PALETTE["gold_brown"]),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    card_h = Inches(1.5)
    gap_x = Inches(0.4)
    gap_y = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (CONTENT_WIDTH - 3 * card_w.inches - 2 * gap_x.inches) / 2
    y_row1 = Inches(1.5)
    y_row2 = y_row1 + card_h.inches + gap_y

    for idx, (region, yield_val, accent) in enumerate(regions):
        col = idx % 3
        row = idx // 3
        x = start_x + col * (card_w.inches + gap_x.inches)
        y = y_row1 if row == 0 else y_row2
        card = add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h, region, yield_val, PALETTE["white"], accent)
        bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, card_w, Inches(0.1))
        bar.fill.solid()
        bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent)
        bar.line.fill.background()


def build_yield_trends(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "5-Year Yield Trends"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), "5-Year Yield Trends", font_size=28, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["dark_green"])
    add_section_label(slide, "Average Yield per Acre (Tons)")

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024"]
    chart_data.add_series("Corn", (4.5, 4.7, 4.9, 5.0, 5.1))
    chart_data.add_series("Wheat", (3.2, 3.4, 3.5, 3.6, 3.8))
    chart_data.add_series("Soybeans", (2.1, 2.3, 2.4, 2.5, 2.6))

    left = Inches(1.0)
    top = Inches(1.7)
    width = Inches(8.0)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart

    colors = [PALETTE["medium_green"], PALETTE["gold_brown"], PALETTE["brown"]]
    for i, series in enumerate(chart.plots[0].series):
        series.format.fill.solid()
        series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(colors[i])
        series.marker.style = 8
        series.marker.size = 10

    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.include_in_layout = False


def build_cooperative_comparison(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Cooperative Performance"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), "Cooperative Performance", font_size=28, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["dark_green"])
    add_section_label(slide, "Total Yield by Cooperative (Million Tons)")

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Green Valley Co-op", "Harvest Ridge Co-op", "Prairie Fields Co-op", "River Bend Co-op", "Sunrise Farms Co-op"]
    chart_data.add_series("2024 Yield (M tons)", (3.8, 3.1, 2.9, 2.5, 1.9))

    left = Inches(1.0)
    top = Inches(1.7)
    width = Inches(8.0)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.BAR_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart

    series = chart.plots[0].series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["dark_green"])

    value_labels = series.data_labels
    value_labels.number_format = "#,##0.0"
    value_labels.font.size = Pt(10)


def build_challenges_opportunities(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Challenges & Opportunities"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), "Challenges & Opportunities", font_size=28, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["dark_green"])

    # Left column — Challenges
    left_col_x = MARGIN_LEFT
    left_col_w = Inches(4.5)
    add_text_box(slide, left_col_x + Inches(0.3), Inches(1.2), left_col_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), "Key Challenges", font_size=18, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["brown"])

    challenge_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CROSS, left_col_x + Inches(0.3), Inches(1.25), Inches(0.25), Inches(0.25))
    challenge_shape.fill.solid()
    challenge_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["brown"])
    challenge_shape.line.fill.background()

    challenges_text = "• Unpredictable weather patterns affecting planting schedules\n• Rising input costs for fertilizers and fuel\n• Labor shortages during peak harvest periods\n• Soil degradation in older farmland areas"
    add_text_box(slide, left_col_x + Inches(0.7), Inches(1.65), left_col_w - Inches(1.0), Inches(3.5), challenges_text, font_size=12, color_hex=PALETTE["dark_text"])

    # Right column — Opportunities
    right_col_x = MARGIN_LEFT + left_col_w + Inches(0.4)
    right_col_w = CONTENT_WIDTH - left_col_w.inches - 0.4
    add_text_box(slide, right_col_x + Inches(0.3), Inches(1.2), right_col_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), "Growth Opportunities", font_size=18, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["dark_green"])

    opp_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CROSS, right_col_x + Inches(0.3), Inches(1.25), Inches(0.25), Inches(0.25))
    opp_shape.fill.solid()
    opp_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["dark_green"])
    opp_shape.line.fill.background()

    opportunities_text = "• Precision agriculture technology adoption\n• New drought-resistant crop varieties\n• Expanded export market access\n• Cooperative resource-sharing programs"
    add_text_box(slide, right_col_x + Inches(0.7), Inches(1.65), right_col_w - Inches(1.0), Inches(3.5), opportunities_text, font_size=12, color_hex=PALETTE["dark_text"])


def build_closing_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["dark_green"])

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(2.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.0), "Thank You", font_size=40, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["cream"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.0), Inches(3.2), Inches(2.0), Inches(0.06))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["gold_brown"])
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(7.0), Inches(0.4), "Next Steps & Action Items", font_size=20, color_hex=PALETTE["beige"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(7.0), Inches(2.0), "• Review regional performance data with cooperative leaders\n• Finalize 2025 planting strategy and resource allocation\n• Schedule field visits to top-performing cooperatives\n• Present findings at annual general assembly", font_size=14, color_hex=PALETTE["light_green"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(6.5), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.3), "Farm Cooperative Alliance — Contact: info@farmcooperative.org", font_size=10, color_hex=PALETTE["beige"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH_IN)
    prs.slide_height = Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT_IN)

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_executive_summary(prs)
    build_crop_performance(prs)
    build_regional_breakdown(prs)
    build_yield_trends(prs)
    build_cooperative_comparison(prs)
    build_challenges_opportunities(prs)
    build_closing_slide(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
